## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any issue. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` is green
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Matched existing style; optional deps are lazy-imported + declared in `pyproject.toml`
- [ ] Updated docs / README / COMPARISON if user-facing
- [ ] No secrets or large binaries committed
